title: elembio/bases2fastq-nf pipeline parameters
description: FASTQ generation using Bases2Fastq for Element AVITI System

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

run_dir.description: Path to AVITI run directory (local or S3)

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved.

id.description: Optional run identifier. If not set: when run_dir matches .../runs/<instrument>/<run_id>/analysis/<analysis_id>/..., that run_id is used; otherwise the last path segment of run_dir.

shared_filters.title: Shared Filters
shared_filters.description: Filters shared with other Element pipelines for consistent data subsetting.

tile.description: Tile regex pattern(s). Falls back to b2f_include_tile when that param is empty.

filter_batch.description: Restrict to specific batch(es), comma-delimited (e.g. B01,B02)

b2f_run_manifest.description: Path to a custom RunManifest.csv file. Passed to bases2fastq via -r.

b2f_error_on_missing.description: Error on missing files in the run directory

b2f_force_detect_index_orientation.description: Detect index orientation by scanning all tiles and using the highest-PF tile in each lane (bases2fastq >= 2.4.0)

b2f_no_error_on_invalid.description: Skip invalid files instead of erroring

b2f_per_target_fastq.description: Create per-target FASTQ for each cell assignment target

b2f_qc_only.description: Generate QC metrics only, no FASTQs

b2f_skip_empty_fq_files.description: Do not create FASTQ files for sample/read outputs with zero reads (bases2fastq >= 2.4.0)

b2f_bgzf_compression.description: Use BGZF block compression for FASTQ output; produces a .fastq.gz.gzi index alongside each FASTQ

b2f_cyto_fastq_mask.description: Cycle mask for cyto FASTQ generation

b2f_log_level.description: Log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR

b2f_segmentation.description: Path to CellSegmentation/ directory (local or remote). Forwarded to bases2fastq via --segmentation (requires bases2fastq >= 2.4.0).

b2f_analysis_region.description: Path to AnalysisRegion/ directory (local or remote). Forwarded to bases2fastq via --analysis-region (requires bases2fastq >= 2.4.0).

b2f_include_tile.description: Tile inclusion regex patterns. When set, auto-excludes all tiles so includes work as a filter. Falls back to shared tile param if empty.

b2f_exclude_tile.description: Tile exclusion regex patterns. Auto-populated when include tiles are active.

b2f_args.description: DEPRECATED: catch-all string appended to bases2fastq CLI. Prefer overriding `withName: BASES2FASTQ { ext.args = { ... } }` in a `-c custom.config` overlay; see conf/modules.config for the canonical closure. Will be removed in a future release.

docker_containers.title: Docker Containers
docker_containers.description: Docker container image URLs and version tags.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Resource limits and pipeline infrastructure settings.
